brief_notes: Systems neuroscience working memory model paper (41 stat sentences). Many correlation coefficients verified: r=-0.35 PV-hierarchy, r=0.91 delay-hierarchy, r=-0.43 delay-PV, r=0.89 hierarchy prediction, r=-0.4 PV prediction, r=0.78/-0.26 auditory, r=0.94 thalamic, r=0.77 thalamocortical, r=0.25/0.24 non-sig, r=0.90 cell-type specific. Gradient values g_E=0.4nA, 0.192nA, etc verified. 4 figures. 30 citations. 6927 words, comprehensive.
